name: canopy-browser
description: A macOS Chromium browser with spatial tabs and private Canopy settings.

scripts.check: pnpm test && node scripts/validate-extension.mjs && node --check extension/core.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/gestures.js && node --check extension/sidepanel.js && bash -n scripts/download-chromium.sh scripts/run-canopy.sh scripts/build-mac-app.sh scripts/prepare-profile.sh
